title: The Beach Of Lies: The Heather Teague Case
description: We sit down with Sarah Teague, the mother of Heather Teague, who vanished in 1995 from a Kentucky beach. For nearly three decades, her disappearance has been a chilling mystery. Now, for the first time, Sarah shares never-before-seen information that she believes could finally lead to answers.

title: Beyond the Scales: Amanda Halterman's Journey
description: We sit down with Amanda Halterman, a key figure from TLC's hit show '1000-lb Sisters.' Beyond the familiar family dynamics and weight loss journeys, Amanda opens up about her personal experiences and her own path to self-discovery.

title: What Happened to My Dad?
description: Raynel talks about information he is receiving regarding the untimely passing of his dad. He is asking if anyone knows anything to please reach out to him or law enforcement. A powerful episode about seeking justice and answers.
